# IKE Workspace Model

> Typed model for workspace.yaml manifests with graph algorithms
> (topological sort, cascade analysis, cycle detection) and version
> manipulation utilities. Foundation for ike-maven-plugin workspace goals.

## Overview

- [IKE Workspace Model](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/index.html.md)

## Reports

- [Project Dependencies](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/dependencies.html.md)
- [Maven Coordinates](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/dependency-info.html.md)
- [Project Dependency Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/dependency-management.html.md)
- [Project Distribution Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/distribution-management.html.md)
- [Project Licenses](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/licenses.html.md)
- [Project Plugin Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/plugin-management.html.md)
- [Project Plugins](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/plugins.html.md)
- [Project Summary](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/summary.html.md)
- [Project Information](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/project-info.html.md)
- [Generated Reports](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-workspace-model/project-reports.html.md)
